questionHtml:
Ammonium nitrate, NH4NO3, is used as a high nitrogen fertilizer.

Calculate the pH of an ammonium nitrate solution with [H3O+] = 1.07 × 10−5 mol dm−3. Use section 1 of the data booklet.

meta.title: Calculate the pH of an ammonium nitrate solution with [H3O+] = 1.07 × 10−5 mol dm−3. Use section 1 of the data booklet.
